title: Shenyang Metro PIDS Resource Pack 沈阳地铁资源包-PIDS
description: SYM (Shenyang Metro) Resource Pack - PIDS 沈阳地铁资源包-PIDS
body:
# SYM (Shenyang Metro) Resource Pack - PIDS 沈阳地铁资源包 - PIDS

## Introduction 介绍

This project is a subsidiary project of the Shenyang Metro Resource Pack project, responsible for recreating all PIDS within the Shenyang Metro system using MTR4 and JCM modules.

本项目是沈阳地铁资源包项目的附属项目，负责使用MTR4，JCM模组复刻沈阳地铁系统内的所有PIDS。

## Usage and Screenshoot 用法和截图

You can find usage and screenshoots in [Github Repository](https://github.com/fangkehou-team/sym-mtr-jcm-pids?tab=readme-ov-file#--%E6%B2%88%E9%98%B3%E5%9C%B0%E9%93%81%E8%B5%84%E6%BA%90%E5%8C%85---pids)

用法和截图在 [Github 仓库](https://github.com/fangkehou-team/sym-mtr-jcm-pids?tab=readme-ov-file#--%E6%B2%88%E9%98%B3%E5%9C%B0%E9%93%81%E8%B5%84%E6%BA%90%E5%8C%85---pids)中。
